Air Traffic
Every minute, every hour, every day, there are men and women at work to ensure the safety and efficiency of our national airspace system.
The
FAA
provides air traffic services for the world's largest and busiest airspace. Tens of thousands of aircraft are guided safely and expeditiously every day through America's National Airspace System to their destinations.
Learn More

Air Traffic Plans & Publications
Find manuals, publications and other air traffic procedures.
International Aviation
Information on international aircraft certification and prohibitions, restrictions and notices.
Obstruction Evaluation
FAA studies for any object that may affect the national airspace, air navigation facilities, or airport capacity.
Separation Standards
Separation standards facilitate the safe navigation of aircraft in controlled airspace.
